goal: Add a fixed, public-safe protected Beta failure-phase taxonomy so a later separately authorized attempt can identify the bounded failing operation without exposing Secrets, Gmail data, private repository identifiers, exception text or exact mailbox counts.
scope: closed failure-phase enum and deterministic reason-code mapping
fixed-schema public failure payload with no exception input
phase instrumentation across context, bootstrap, Raw-only runtime, aggregate gate and cleanup
local synthetic regressions for every reachable phase and cleanup failure
Stage 7 validator, evidence, status, Governance facts and package-manifest regeneration
non_goals: a second branch push, pull request, main delivery, workflow dispatch or rerun
retrospectively guessing the exact root cause of the consumed failed attempt
reading any real Secret, Gmail message or private repository
changing sender verification, encryption, Raw commit or recovery semantics
running M3, Processed, Timeline, schedule, GA, Recovery Drill or Patch Lifecycle
claiming T0702, S7AC-002, production health, final Acceptance or Stage 7 complete
acceptance: Every emitted failure phase and reason code belongs to one exact closed enum.
The public failure renderer receives no exception or dynamic protected value.
The JSON Schema rejects extra properties and mismatched phase/reason pairs.
Synthetic phase probes prove context, bootstrap, runtime, Raw, recovery and aggregate boundaries are wired.
A cleanup failure is classified as RESOURCE_CLEANUP after every cleanup action is attempted.
Existing Raw-only, no-mutation, first-attempt and six-Secret boundaries remain unchanged.
All local Stage 7, package, publication, type, lint and task gates pass while T0702 remains BLOCKED.
risk: A phase label can reveal the coarse operation reached, but cannot reveal whether a message existed, any exact count, identifier, header, URL, repository locator, Secret value or exception text. The taxonomy therefore remains intentionally bounded and cannot establish the exact root cause by itself.
rollback: Revert only this uncommitted repair delta. The consumed protected attempt receipt and controlled main delivery remain immutable historical evidence.
stop_conditions: any diagnostic field can contain dynamic exception text or protected input
the taxonomy requires a new Secret, permission, artifact, cache or persistent log
the change alters Gmail, Raw commit, recovery, M3 or mutation behavior
a real service call, second delivery, workflow dispatch or rerun becomes necessary
the failed attempt is reclassified as PASS or its exact root cause is guessed
any final Acceptance, production health or Stage 7 completion claim becomes true
